name: Q-12 --query --commit-sha filters log entries to a single commit per §26 traceability contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/agent-invocations.sh" --append --subagent-id review-types --prompt-id p --prompt-version 1.0.0 --model sonnet --tokens-in 100 --tokens-out 50 --latency-ms 1000 --exit-code 0 --commit-sha abc123 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/agent-invocations.sh" --append --subagent-id review-types --prompt-id p --prompt-version 1.0.0 --model sonnet --tokens-in 100 --tokens-out 50 --latency-ms 1000 --exit-code 0 --commit-sha def456 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/agent-invocations.sh" --query --commit-sha abc123 --format jsonl >out.jsonl && [ "$(wc -l < out.jsonl | tr -d ' ')" = "1" ] && echo filtered 1>&2
